title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat by exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code. This can lead to widespread data encryption, operational disruptions, and potential data breaches, impacting business continuity and reputation.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing multi-factor authentication (MFA), access controls, and regular security audits.
Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions and monitor cloud environments for unusual activity or unauthorized changes.
Ensure regular backups of critical data are performed and stored offline, and test the restoration process to ensure business continuity in case of an attack.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title:
Net::Statsd::Tiny versions before 0.3.8 for Perl allowed metric injections.

The metric names and...
description:
Net::Statsd::Tiny versions before 0.3.8 for Perl allowed metric injections.

The metric names and set values were not checked for newlines, colons or pipes. Metrics generated from untrusted sources could inject additional statsd metrics.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Net::Statsd::Tiny versions before 0.3.8 allows attackers to inject unauthorized metrics by exploiting unchecked metric names and values. This could lead to data manipulation, misleading monitoring results, and potential disruption of analytics or alerting systems.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to Net::Statsd::Tiny version 0.3.8 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Audit and sanitize all input data used to generate metrics to prevent injection attacks.
Implement monitoring and alerting for unusual or unexpected metrics to detect potential exploitation.

title: A vulnerability was determined in Metasoft 美特软件 MetaCRM up to 6.4.0 Beta06. This impacts an...
description: A vulnerability was determined in Metasoft 美特软件 MetaCRM up to 6.4.0 Beta06. This impacts an unknown function of the file /common/jsp/upload3.jsp. Executing a manipulation of the argument File can lead to unrestricted upload. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8758.

title: Zechat 1.5 contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the hashtag parameter that allows...
description: Zechat 1.5 contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the hashtag parameter that allows unauthenticated attackers to extract database information using union-based techniques. Attackers can exploit the hashtag parameter with union-based payloads to retrieve table and column names.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25338.

title: Zechat 1.5 contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the v parameter that allows unauthenticated...
description: Zechat 1.5 contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the v parameter that allows unauthenticated attackers to extract database information using time-based blind techniques. Attackers can exploit the v parameter with sleep-based blind injection to confirm vulnerability and extract data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in Zechat 1.5 allows unauthenticated attackers to extract sensitive database information, potentially leading to data breaches, unauthorized access, and system compromise.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update Zechat to a version where the vulnerability is fixed.
Implement input validation and parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection attacks.
Conduct a security audit to identify and remediate similar vulnerabilities in the application.

title: Joomla JoomOCShop 1.0 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows attackers...
description: Joomla JoomOCShop 1.0 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows attackers to perform unauthorized actions on behalf of authenticated users. Attackers can craft malicious HTML forms targeting account endpoints like /joomoc2/?route=account/edit and to modify user information or reset passwords without user consent.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25337.

title: A flaw has been found in fishaudio Bert-VITS2 up to 8f7fbd8c4770965225d258db548da27dc8dd934c. The...
description: A flaw has been found in fishaudio Bert-VITS2 up to 8f7fbd8c4770965225d258db548da27dc8dd934c. The affected element is the function _get_all_models of the file hiyoriUI.py of the component Model Handler. This manipulation causes path traversal. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. Continious delivery with rolling releases is used by this product. Therefore, no version details of affected nor updated releases are available. The vendor was contacted

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the function _get_all_models of hiyoriUI.py allows for path traversal attacks, which could enable unauthorized access to sensitive files or directories on the server. This could lead to data breaches, exposure of confidential information, or further exploitation of the system.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and sanitize file path inputs in the _get_all_models function to prevent path traversal attacks.
Implement strict access controls and monitoring to detect and mitigate unauthorized access attempts.
Notify users of the vulnerability and provide guidance on mitigating risks until a patched version is released.

title: A vulnerability was found in adenhq hive up to 0.11.0. This affects the function...
description: A vulnerability was found in adenhq hive up to 0.11.0. This affects the function _read_events_tail of the file core/framework/server/routes_sessions.py of the component Delete Request Handler. Performing a manipulation results in path traversal. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for path traversal attacks via the Delete Request Handler in the adenhq hive framework, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive files or directories. Since the exploit is public and can be initiated remotely, it poses a significant risk to systems using affected versions.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched version of adenhq hive, if available, or apply mitigations to prevent exploitation.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization to prevent path traversal attacks.
Monitor systems for unusual activity and review logs for signs of exploitation, particularly in the Delete Request Handler component.

title: Zechat 1.5 contains a Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability that allows an attacker to...
description: Zechat 1.5 contains a Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability that allows an attacker to change a user's information by bypassing anti-CSRF protections. The application uses a CSRF token, but an attacker can use the hashtag parameter to inject an encoded payload and bypass the CSRF protection, allowing for unauthorized changes to user data. This can be exploited by tricking a user into submitting a crafted form or by using a script to obtain and set the CSRF token.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25334.

title: Google Drive for WordPress 2.2 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows...
description: Google Drive for WordPress 2.2 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files by injecting directory traversal sequences in the file_name parameter. Attackers can send POST requests to gdrive-ajaxs.php with the ajaxstype parameter set to del_fl_bkp and file_name containing traversal sequences ../../wp-config.php to access sensitive configuration files.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The path traversal vulnerability in Google Drive for WordPress 2.2 allows unauthenticated attackers to access sensitive files, such as wp-config.php, which may contain database credentials, encryption keys, and other critical configuration details. Exploitation could lead to unauthorized access, data breaches, and potential compromise of the entire WordPress site.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Google Drive for WordPress plugin to the latest patched version or disable it until a fix is available.
Implement web application firewall (WAF) rules to detect and block directory traversal attempts.
Restrict access to sensitive files such as wp-config.php by configuring proper file permissions and server rules.

title: Joomla jCart for OpenCart 2.3.0.2 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows...
description: Joomla jCart for OpenCart 2.3.0.2 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows attackers to modify user account information without authentication. Attackers can craft malicious HTML forms targeting endpoints , and to change user credentials, passwords, and affiliate account details when victims visit the attacker-controlled page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25336.

title: Allok Fast AVI MPEG Splitter 1.2 contains a stack based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows...
description: Allok Fast AVI MPEG Splitter 1.2 contains a stack based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by supplying a malicious license name string. Attackers can craft a payload with 780 bytes of junk data followed by structured shellcode and place it in the License Name field to trigger the overflow and execute code with application privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25322.

title: WordPress Plugin Peugeot Music 1.0 contains an arbitrary file upload vulnerability that allows...
description: WordPress Plugin Peugeot Music 1.0 contains an arbitrary file upload vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload malicious files by sending POST requests to the upload.php endpoint. Attackers can upload files with arbitrary extensions by manipulating the 'name' parameter to execute code from the uploads directory.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The arbitrary file upload vulnerability in the WordPress Plugin Peugeot Music 1.0 allows unauthenticated attackers to upload and execute malicious files, potentially leading to full server compromise, data exfiltration, defacement, or malware distribution.
recommended_actions: Immediately disable or remove the Peugeot Music 1.0 plugin from all WordPress installations until a patched version is released.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to block malicious POST requests targeting the 'upload.php' endpoint.
Conduct a thorough review of the WordPress installation for unauthorized file uploads and potential backdoors.

title: Nordex N149/4.0-4.5 Wind Turbine Web Server 4.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that...
description: Nordex N149/4.0-4.5 Wind Turbine Web Server 4.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the login parameter in login.php. Attackers can submit crafted POST requests with SQL injection payloads in the login field to extract sensitive database information and bypass authentication mechanisms.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25333.

title: Zenar Content Management System contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows...
description: Zenar Content Management System contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts by manipulating form parameters in POST requests. Attackers can inject script tags through the current_page parameter sent to the ajax.php endpoint, which reflects unsanitized user input in the response HTML to execute arbitrary JavaScript in victim browsers.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Zenar Content Management System allows attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of a victim's browser. This could lead to session hijacking, data theft, phishing attacks, or unauthorized actions on behalf of the victim.
recommended_actions: Apply input validation and output sanitization to all user-supplied data, particularly the 'current_page' parameter in the ajax.php endpoint.
Update to the latest version of Zenar CMS if a patch addressing CVE-2018-25331 is available.
Implement a Content Security Policy (CSP) to mitigate the impact of potential XSS attacks.

title: GitBucket 4.23.1 contains an unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability that allows...
description: GitBucket 4.23.1 contains an unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability that allows attackers to execute arbitrary commands by exploiting weak secret token generation and insecure file upload functionality. Attackers can brute-force the Blowfish encryption key, upload a malicious JAR plugin via the git-lfs endpoint, and execute system commands through an exposed exploit endpoint.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in GitBucket 4.23.1 allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary system commands, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, and lateral movement within the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade GitBucket to the latest patched version to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and restrict access to the git-lfs endpoint and other exposed endpoints using network-level controls and application firewalls.
Conduct a thorough audit of systems running GitBucket 4.23.1 for signs of compromise, including unauthorized file uploads or suspicious activity.

title: Woocommerce CSV Importer 3.3.6 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows any registered...
description: Woocommerce CSV Importer 3.3.6 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows any registered user to delete arbitrary files by submitting unescaped filenames through the delete_export_file AJAX action. Attackers can craft POST requests with directory traversal sequences in the filename parameter to delete sensitive files like wp-config.php outside the intended export directory.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25325.

title: CVE-2026-7258 - In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, and 8.5.* before 8.5.
description: In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, and 8.5.* before 8.5.6, some functions, including urldecode(), pass signed char to ctype functions (like isxdigit()). On the systems with default signed char and optimized table-lookup ctype functions - such as NetBSD - this can lead to accessing array with negative offset, which can trigger a denial of service.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7258.

title: CVE-2026-6735 - In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, 8.5.* before 8.5.6, d
description: In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, 8.5.* before 8.5.6, due to improper sanitation of user data, it allows an attacker to compose an URL, which will cause the target to execute arbitrary JavaScript code (XSS) on the target's machine when the target is viewing the PHP-FPM status page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript code (XSS) on the target's machine when viewing the PHP-FPM status page. This could lead to session hijacking, unauthorized access, or data exfiltration.
recommended_actions: Upgrade PHP to the latest patched versions: 8.2.31, 8.3.31, 8.4.21, or 8.5.6.
Restrict access to the PHP-FPM status page using IP whitelisting or authentication mechanisms.
Conduct a security review of web applications to ensure proper input sanitization and mitigate XSS risks.

title: CVE-2026-6722 - In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, and 8.5.* before 8.5.
description: In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, and 8.5.* before 8.5.6, the SOAP extension's object deduplication mechanism stores pointers to PHP objects in a global map without incrementing their reference counts. When an apache:Map node contains duplicate keys, processing the second entry overwrites the first in the temporary result map, freeing the original PHP object while its stale pointer remains in the map. A subsequent href reference to the freed node can copy the dangling pointer into the result. As PHP string allocations can reclaim the freed memory region, an attacker with control over the SOAP request body can exploit this use-after-free to achieve remote code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6722.

title: CVE-2025-14179 - In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, and 8.5.* before 8.5.
description: In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, and 8.5.* before 8.5.6, the PDO Firebird driver improperly handles NUL bytes when preparing SQL queries. During token-by-token query construction, a string token containing a NUL byte is copied via strncat(), which stops at the NUL byte, dropping the closing quote and causing subsequent SQL tokens to be interpreted as part of the string. This allows SQL injection when attacker-controlled values are quoted via PDO::quote() and embedded in SQL statements.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2025-14179.

title: CVE-2026-8224 - A vulnerability was determined in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. Affected by this issue is the function pcf_se
description: A vulnerability was determined in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. Affected by this issue is the function pcf_sess_set_ipv6prefix of the file /src/pcf/context.c of the component PCF. Executing a manipulation of the argument SmPolicyContextData.ipv6AddressPrefix can lead to denial of service. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8224.
